_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn what an ethical perspective is and how values, shared expectations, and rights and responsibilities shape our views.

_source.w: We learn what an ethical perspective is and how values, shared expectations, and rights and responsibilities shape our views.
y: Understanding ethical perspectives helps us see why people view the same issue differently.
Our values and expectations influence every ethical judgement we make.
Recognising what shapes perspectives helps us have more respectful conversations.
eg: We discuss how different values lead people to different conclusions about the same situation.
We explore how our family's values influence what we think is right or wrong.
We investigate how shared expectations in our school shape our behaviour.
We identify how rights and responsibilities connect to ethical views.
We compare two perspectives on the same issue and trace them back to different values.
We discuss why understanding someone's perspective doesn't mean we have to agree with it.
